intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (GSM5746259 - Patient 145, Day 0) with scanpy. Let me load the recipe first to ensure I follow best practices.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

blocks.text: Now let me present a plan based on the recipe:

input.title: Standard scRNA-seq processing for GSM5746259 (Patient 145, Day 0)
input.summary: QC → filtering → normalization → HVG selection → PCA → neighbors → UMAP → Leiden clustering → marker genes
input.rationale: Follow best-practice scanpy workflow with quality control, dimensionality reduction, and clustering to identify cell types and signatures.
input.assumptions:
- Processing a single 10x sample (7,532 cells)
  - Filtering thresholds: n_genes ≥ 200, mitochondrial pct < 20%
  - Target library size: 10,000 UMI
  - Organism: Homo sapiens (mitochondrial genes prefix: MT-)

steps.title: Load sample and compute QC metrics
steps.description: Read the MTX triplet for GSM5746259, calculate per-cell QC metrics (n_genes, n_counts, pct_mito)

steps.title: QC filtering
steps.description: Remove cells with n_genes < 200 or mitochondrial % ≥ 20%

steps.title: Normalization and log transform
steps.description: CPM normalization to 10,000 UMI + log1p transform

steps.title: Highly variable genes
steps.description: Select HVGs using Seurat method; plot HVG selection

steps.title: PCA
steps.description: Compute PCA on HVGs; plot variance explained

steps.title: Neighbors and UMAP
steps.description: Build neighborhood graph (k=15) and compute UMAP

steps.title: Marker genes
steps.description: Rank differentially expressed genes per cluster
